finding: Screen time blocker apps print money - Opal $600k/mo BePresent $300k/mo Brainrot $100k/mo. Niche unlock conditions differentiate.
implementation_notes: Build niche variants: PrayerLock (Faith) WalkToUnlock (Fitness) StudyLock (Students). Hard paywall from day 1.

finding: 30-app portfolio strategy makes $22k/mo - ship single feature bug-free don't polish just ship fast and move on
implementation_notes: Target 2-3 apps per month. Single core feature per app. Double down on winners only.

finding: TikTok trend research for app ideas - Connor Burd $185k/mo portfolio. Heavy research into TikTok + App Store trends. Partner with influencers.
implementation_notes: Monitor TikTok trends daily. Cross-reference appkittie. Partner with niche influencers for validation.

finding: Custom Product Pages iOS allows 35 variants per app - target different keywords audiences or campaigns per page
implementation_notes: Create product page per niche. Customize screenshots. Link from targeted paid campaigns.

finding: First 2 screenshots determine downloads - 70% of users never scroll past screenshot 2. A/B test icon weekly.
implementation_notes: Put core value in screenshot 1. Use benefit-driven text overlay. Heatmap test icon.

finding: FB Ads Library mining - if product paying for ads it's making money. Search: Ebook Digital PDF Template Planner.
proof_numbers: Products paying for ads = revenue proof
implementation_notes: Search FB Ads Library. Filter active ads. Analyze landing pages. Create niche versions.

finding: Authority trust stack for paywall conversion - Harvard citations + visual goal timelines + bright colors = higher conversion
implementation_notes: Add legitimate source citations. Build visual progress timelines. Bright paywall CTAs.

finding: YouTube Shorts real revenue - Dan Koe $4495 payout in 2 weeks (Jan 2026). ~$9K/month potential from Shorts alone.
implementation_notes: Prioritize YouTube Shorts over TikTok for monetization. Share payouts for credibility.

finding: Platform monetization hierarchy Jan 2026: Facebook Reels (highest CPM) > YouTube Shorts ($0.40+ RPM) > YouTube Long > IG Reels > TikTok (unreliable)
implementation_notes: Focus FB Reels for short-form revenue. YouTube long-form 10min+ for premium CPM.

finding: 348+ AI UGC videos DAILY at industrial scale - @Jonnyvandel masscontent.ai 40000+ posts per month
implementation_notes: Study masscontent.ai workflows. AI + multi-account infrastructure.

finding: High-CPM faceless niches: Finance ($15-50 CPM) Tech ($8-25) Health ($6-15) Meditation/sleep ($5-12). Avoid gaming (sub-$2 saturated).
implementation_notes: Target finance/investing for highest CPM. Meditation/sleep evergreen + decent CPM.

finding: Opus Clip Pro - AI virality score + auto-posting to TikTok/YT/Reels. Upload long-form -> AI finds clips -> scores potential -> auto-posts. $29/mo.
implementation_notes: Use for long-form to short clips automation. ROI positive if saves 10+ hrs/week.

finding: 1 to 30 content multiplication - Create 1 master video -> 10 platform variants + 10 text posts + 10 images. Template-based.
implementation_notes: Create 1 master weekly. Use templates for each platform. Schedule all 30 across week.

finding: Elite cold email = 10%+ reply rate. Average is 3.43%. 58% of replies come from first email. AI does 80% of research.
implementation_notes: Target 10% reply rate. Focus first email quality. Use AI for research.

finding: 2026 cold email stack: Clay (enrichment + intent) + Apollo (data) + Instantly (sending). Signal-based timing not spray and pray.
implementation_notes: Set up Clay with intent triggers. Apollo for contacts. Instantly for sending.

finding: Voice note outbound = 40%+ reply rate on LinkedIn 3x engagement vs text. 45-60s max. Pattern interrupt + trust.
implementation_notes: Use voice notes for LinkedIn/IG DM outreach. Under 60 seconds.

finding: Loom video prospecting for $10k+ deals - 40%+ reply rates. Show their site on screen. Under 60s personalized.
implementation_notes: Use Loom for high-value prospects only. Research specific pain points.

finding: Multi-channel DM+Email sequence: DM on social -> 48hrs -> Email referencing DM = 2.5x reply rate vs email alone
implementation_notes: DM first then email with reference. Multi-touch builds familiarity.

finding: Zero-click search dominance - 60%+ of Google searches now zero-click. Optimize for position zero featured snippets.
implementation_notes: Structure content for snippets. Answer in first 100 words. Add tables/lists.

finding: GEO citation patterns - AI engines cite sources with clear structure authoritative data recent updates. Perplexity favors technical depth.
implementation_notes: Add dates to all content. Cite 3-5 sources per article. Update content quarterly.

finding: Video SEO dominance - 70%+ of Google SERPs show video. YouTube 2nd largest search engine. Video thumbnails 41% higher CTR.
implementation_notes: Create YouTube video per blog post. Add video schema. Embed video above fold.

finding: Topic clusters over keywords - pillar page + 10+ cluster articles interlinked outranks single keyword pages
implementation_notes: Create pillar page per main topic. Write 10+ cluster articles. Interlink all.

finding: App Store screenshot text indexed - iOS OCR scans screenshot text for keyword indexing. Strategic text boosts ranking.
implementation_notes: Add keyword-rich text to first 2 screenshots. Make text readable at thumbnail.

finding: Programmatic SEO - auto-generate 1000s of pages from data. Zapier has 25k+ pages. Requires unique value per page.
implementation_notes: Identify data source. Create template. Generate 1000+ variations.

finding: AI influencer tool stack $40/mo: Leonardo.ai $12 (visuals) + ElevenLabs $22 (voice) + D-ID $6 (video). Entry cost.
implementation_notes: Subscribe to all three. Create character reference sheet. Lock voice settings.

finding: AI influencer revenue timeline: Month 1-3 learning. Month 3-6 first $100-500/mo. Month 6-12 $500-2k/mo. Year 1+ $2k-10k/mo.
implementation_notes: Don't expect revenue month 1-3. Focus on 10k followers for brand deals.

finding: Double disclosure requirement - AI content needs: 1) Sponsored/affiliate disclosure 2) AI-generated disclosure. NY law June 2026.
implementation_notes: Add AI disclosure to bio. Spoken disclosure in videos. Document compliance.

finding: Own being AI as feature - don't apologize. Lead with transparency. AI advantages: consistency data synthesis 24/7 availability.
implementation_notes: Add 'I'm an AI' to bio. Create content about AI advantages.

finding: ASMR AI persona - YouTube ads $2-10 CPM on 30min-2hr videos. Patreon $5-20/mo. Audio-only reduces AI detection concerns.
implementation_notes: 30min+ videos for mid-roll ads. ElevenLabs voice. Patreon tiers.

finding: AI fitness coach monetization - affiliates (MyProtein 5-8%) + workout subscriptions $20-50/mo + supplement sponsors
implementation_notes: Athletic AI persona. Motivational voice. Workout demos + form tips.

finding: Claude MCP servers expanding capabilities - browser control automation integrations. Playwriter MCP controls user's actual Chrome.
implementation_notes: Use Chrome MCP for simple tasks. Playwriter for complex flows.

finding: n8n self-hosted = unlimited workflows at $20/mo server cost. Replaces Zapier at 10x scale. Best for content repurposing.
implementation_notes: Set up n8n on $20/mo VPS. Connect social APIs. Scale without per-task costs.

finding: Ralph agent loops for overnight autonomous builds - fresh context each cycle. Memory = filesystem not context window.
implementation_notes: Set up ralph loops. Write to disk immediately. Static prompts.

finding: Claude Artifacts for landing page prototyping - generate React components instantly. Test 10 variations in an hour.
implementation_notes: Describe goal. Generate with Artifacts. Iterate fast. Export winners.

finding: FindMeCreators for micro-influencer discovery - 10k-100k followers filter by engagement rate. Better ROI than macro.
implementation_notes: Build roster via FindMeCreators. Start with 10-50 micro creators.

finding: Nano Banana + Kling + Veo 3.1 workflow for AI video - Pinterest reference -> Nano Banana recreate -> Kling motion -> Veo animate
implementation_notes: Pinterest reference. Recreate with Nano Banana. Animate with Kling/Veo.

finding: LED Face Mask 7-in-1 arbitrage: Temu $30 -> Amazon $79.99 = 62% margin. 600M+ posts TikTok viral beauty tech.
implementation_notes: Source from Temu. List on Amazon. TikTok viral = demand proof.

finding: Phone accessories arbitrage: Wholesale $3 -> eBay $14.99 = 80% margin. $283B market growing to $370B by 2032.
implementation_notes: Most profitable eBay category. Mobile device growth drives demand.

finding: Vintage clothing thrift arbitrage: Thrift $5 -> eBay $35 = 86% margin. 100%+ margins common on unique pieces.
implementation_notes: Thrift for unique pieces. High perceived value on eBay.

finding: TikTok Shop dropshipping: Biodance masks AliExpress $8 -> Amazon $24.99 = 68% margin. Glass skin glow viral.
implementation_notes: Single-use masks = high repeat purchase. TikTok viral demand.

finding: Print on demand: Custom T-Shirt Printify $7.50 -> Etsy $25 = 70% margin. Hyper-personalization wins 2026.
implementation_notes: Names + dates drive highest conversion. Personalization key.

finding: TikTok monetization unreliable 2026 - declining/zero ad revenue share for many creators. Use as traffic source only.
implementation_notes: Don't rely on TikTok monetization. Drive traffic to YouTube/FB for revenue.

finding: Instagram Reels prioritizing original audio Jan 2026 - trending audio less effective. Original voiceover = better reach.
implementation_notes: Create original audio for Reels. AI voice tools for faceless original audio.

finding: Product Hunt launch timing: Tuesday-Thursday best. 12:01 AM PT. 200+ upvotes lined up. Respond all comments. PotD = 2000-5000 signups.
implementation_notes: Prepare supporters. Launch Tue-Thu. Rally 200+ initial upvotes.

finding: Apple Search Ads best ROI for app installs - 70% of App Store visits from search. Run FIRST before other paid.
implementation_notes: Run Apple Search Ads first. Best ROI for app installs.

finding: Animated paywalls produce 2.9x higher conversion rates than static designs. Animation typically increases 12-18%.
implementation_notes: Add subtle animations to paywall. Animate CTA buttons. A/B test.

finding: Push notification in first 90 days = 3x more likely to stick. But 78% say irrelevant notifications are dealbreaker.
implementation_notes: Send welcome push Day 1. Personalize. Limit 1-2 per week max.

finding: Lifetime purchase option at 3-5x annual price - 10-15% take it. Immediate cash flow for development.
implementation_notes: Add lifetime tier. Position as best value. Use cash for dev.

finding: Email flash sale $15-45k in 48 hours - 15-30 days value emails then one flash sale. Works with just 200 subscribers.
implementation_notes: Build email list. 15-30 days value. Drop flash sale. Return to value.

finding: RevenueCat Experiments for paywall A/B testing without app update. Test pricing first then design. 1000+ users per variant.
implementation_notes: Set up Experiments. Create paywall variants. Test pricing first.

finding: 500 Clipper Network Model - pay 300-500 clippers $1/1k views. Case study: 43k downloads for $6k spend.
implementation_notes: Build clipper roster. Distribute content briefs. Pay performance. Double down winners.

finding: X launch viral hack - strong hook + demo + ask for comments not DMs. Algorithm loves comments = viral potential.
implementation_notes: Craft strong hook. Compelling demo. Ask for comments. Build 5-8k followers first.

finding: User calls as cheat codes - users hop on calls way more than expected. These conversations are product improvement gold.
implementation_notes: Add Calendly link to app. Offer call incentive. Document learnings.

title: Google E-E-A-T 2026 Priority
description: Experience added to E-A-T in 2022, now critical for YMYL content. First-hand experience signals: author bylines, credentials, real photos, specific anecdotes, detailed process descriptions.
actionable_steps: 1. Add author bio with credentials to all content 2. Include first-person experience 3. Add specific numbers/dates from personal use 4. Include real photos not stock 5. Link to author social profiles

title: Zero-Click Search Dominance 2026
description: 60%+ of Google searches now zero-click (featured snippets, AI overviews). Optimize for position zero not just #1. Answer boxes drive brand awareness even without clicks.
actionable_steps: 1. Structure content for featured snippets 2. Use definition format in first 100 words 3. Add tables for comparison content 4. Use numbered/bulleted lists 5. Include FAQ schema

title: Core Web Vitals 2026 Thresholds
description: LCP <2.5s, FID <100ms, CLS <0.1 remain ranking factors. New: INP (Interaction to Next Paint) replaces FID in March 2024. Mobile-first indexing is default.
actionable_steps: 1. Audit Core Web Vitals monthly 2. Optimize images with WebP/AVIF 3. Implement lazy loading 4. Monitor INP for interactions 5. Test on real mobile devices

title: GEO Citation Patterns 2026
description: AI engines cite sources with: clear structure, authoritative data, recent updates, cited sources. Perplexity favors technical depth over SEO keywords. ChatGPT favors conversational confidence.
actionable_steps: 1. Add dates to all content 2. Cite 3-5 authoritative sources per article 3. Use tables for data 4. Update content quarterly 5. Add 'Last updated' timestamp

title: App Store Voice Search Optimization
description: Siri/Google Assistant queries use natural language. 'Hey Siri apps for prayer' vs searching 'prayer app'. Optimize for conversational long-tail keywords in metadata.
actionable_steps: 1. Add conversational phrases to app description 2. Include question-based keywords 3. Test voice search queries 4. Use natural language in subtitle 5. Add voice-friendly FAQ

title: App Store Screenshot Text Indexed
description: iOS App Store OCR scans screenshot text for keyword indexing. Text overlay on screenshots contributes to keyword relevance. Strategic use boosts ranking.
actionable_steps: 1. Add keyword-rich text to first 2 screenshots 2. Make text readable at thumbnail size 3. Include primary keyword in screenshot 1 4. Test keyword ranking with/without 5. Don't keyword stuff readability matters

title: Helpful Content Update Ongoing
description: Google's helpful content system is continuous not one-time. People-first content over SEO-first. Signals: satisfies intent, demonstrates expertise, original insights, leaves reader satisfied.
actionable_steps: 1. Audit content for thin pages 2. Add original research/data 3. Remove AI-generated fluff 4. Add author expertise signals 5. Track user engagement metrics

title: Video SEO Dominance 2026
description: Video results appear in 70%+ of Google SERPs. YouTube is 2nd largest search engine. Video thumbnails in search results get 41% higher CTR. Transcripts boost indexing.
actionable_steps: 1. Create YouTube video for every blog post 2. Add video schema to pages 3. Optimize YouTube SEO (title/description/tags) 4. Add transcript to page 5. Embed video above fold

title: Topic Clusters Over Keywords 2026
description: Pillar page + cluster content outranks single keyword pages. Internal linking structure shows topic authority. Create hub-and-spoke model for each niche.
actionable_steps: 1. Create pillar page for main topic 2. Write 10+ cluster articles linking to pillar 3. Interlink all cluster content 4. Use descriptive anchor text 5. Update pillar page with cluster links

title: Custom Product Pages iOS 15+
description: iOS allows up to 35 custom product pages to test different audiences/keywords. Create variations for different use cases. Winner can become default.
actionable_steps: 1. Create 3-5 custom product pages 2. Target different keywords per page 3. Use unique screenshots/copy 4. Run paid ads to custom pages 5. Promote winner to default

title: First 2 Seconds App Store CVR
description: Users decide to download within 2 seconds of seeing listing. Icon and first screenshot are everything. 70% of users never scroll past screenshot 2.
actionable_steps: 1. A/B test icon weekly 2. Put core value in screenshot 1 3. Use benefit-driven text overlay 4. Test with 5-second test 5. Heatmap icon in search results

title: Programmatic SEO 2026 Patterns
description: Auto-generate 1000s of pages from data. Works for: comparison pages, location pages, product variations. Zapier has 25k+ programmatic pages. Requires unique value per page.
actionable_steps: 1. Identify data source (CSV/API) 2. Create template with unique content 3. Add user-generated content section 4. Implement filters/sorting 5. Submit to Search Console

title: Mobile-First Indexing Mandatory
description: Google only uses mobile version for indexing/ranking. Desktop-only content is invisible. Mobile site speed critical. Responsive design is minimum requirement.
actionable_steps: 1. Audit mobile experience 2. Check mobile PageSpeed score 3. Test mobile-first features 4. Ensure all content on mobile 5. Optimize for thumb-friendly navigation

title: App Category Optimization Strategy
description: Choose category based on competition not just fit. Rank #10 in less competitive category beats #100 in obvious category. Subcategory matters for visibility.
actionable_steps: 1. Research competitor categories 2. Analyze top 10 difficulty per category 3. Test secondary categories 4. Monitor ranking by category 5. Switch if not ranking top 50

title: Link Velocity 2026 Signals
description: Natural link growth is steady not spiky. Sudden backlink spikes trigger spam filters. Aim for consistent link building month over month. Quality > quantity.
actionable_steps: 1. Build 5-10 links per month consistently 2. Vary anchor text naturally 3. Focus on relevant sites 4. Track link velocity in GSC 5. Avoid link farms

title: Local SEO for Apps 2026
description: Apps serving local markets: optimize for 'near me' searches, add location to app name, create location-specific screenshots. Google prioritizes local relevance.
actionable_steps: 1. Add city to app subtitle if local 2. Create location landing pages 3. Optimize for '[category] near me' 4. Add location schema 5. Build local backlinks

author: Xivy
text: Want to find winning digital products or info product to replicate?  Go to Facebook Ads Library and search these keywords:  Ebook Digital Download Instant PDF Printable Template Guide Course Planner Editable Tracker Worksheets Cheat Sheet  And you'll find winning digital products for free.  If they're paying for ads, they're making money.

description: Complete Claude Code configuration collection - agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, MCPs. Battle-tested configs from Anthropic hackers.
printmaxx_use_case: Master reference for all Claude Code configurations. Copy skills and hooks directly.
reusable_patterns: Skills structure; hooks patterns; agent configs; MCP setup patterns

synergy_type: YouTube Shorts + lifestyle curator + UGC sourcing
cross_sell_products: TikTok Shop affiliate + organic promo + UGC content
notes: Stack: Lifestyle AI persona promotes products via Shorts → TikTok Shop affiliate links → UGC videos for top sellers → Scale winning products. Same content 3x monetization.
